failedAssertions.reason: Parameter sweep chart empty by default (no dimensions pre-selected), requiring manual selection. Hover tooltips not supported by Plotly go.Parcoords (lines highlight but no value text shown). Chart renders correctly after dimension selection with Viridis colorscale mapping to overall_score.

Experiment detail selector dropdown exists but selecting an experiment does NOT open the detail view. The toggle_detail_view callback chain is broken — detail-view div remains hidden (display:none). This appears to be a broader issue affecting all detail view navigation including leaderboard row clicks, not just the parameter sweep.
